debug_info.goal:
xs : List ℤ
h_precond : longestIncreasingSubseqLength_precond xs
⊢ longestIncreasingSubseqLength_postcond xs (longestIncreasingSubseqLength xs h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
dsimp [longestIncreasingSubseqLength, longestIncreasingSubseqLength_postcond]
  
  have h_strict : ∀ l, isStrictlyIncreasing l ↔ l.Pairwise (· < ·) := by
    intro l
    induction l with
    | nil => simp [isStrictlyIncreasing]
    | cons x xs ih =>
      cases xs <;> simp [isStrictlyIncreasing, List.pairwise_cons] at *
      next y ys =>
        split
        · simp [*]; intro h; exact ⟨fun z hz => by
            cases hz; exact ‹x < y›
            have : y < z := (List.pairwise_cons.1 h).1 z ‹_›
            exact lt_trans ‹x < y› this, h⟩
        · simp [*]; rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact h1 y (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
  
  have h_subs : subsequences xs = List.sublists xs := by
    induction xs <;> simp [subsequences, List.sublists, *]

  have h_mem : ∀ s, s ∈ subsequences xs ↔ s ∈ (xs.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (x :: ·)) [[]] |>.map List.reverse) := by
    have h_fold : xs.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (x :: ·)) [[]] = subsequences xs.reverse := by
      induction xs using List.reverseRecOn with
      | nil => rfl
      | append_singleton ys y ih => simp [List.foldl_append, ih, subsequences, List.reverse_append]
    intro s
    rw [h_subs, List.mem_sublists, h_fold, List.mem_map, h_subs, List.mem_sublists]
    constructor
    · intro h; use s.reverse; rw [List.reverse_sublist_iff, List.reverse_reverse]; exact ⟨h, rfl⟩
    · rintro ⟨l, hl, rfl⟩; rwa [←List.reverse_sublist_iff, List.reverse_reverse]

  let lens := (subsequences xs).filter isStrictlyIncreasing |>.map List.length
  let specLens := (xs.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (x :: ·)) [[]] |>.map List.reverse).filter (fun l => l.Pairwise (· < ·)) |>.map List.length

  have h_lens_eq : ∀ n, n ∈ lens ↔ n ∈ specLens := by
    intro n
    simp only [lens, specLens, List.mem_map, List.mem_filter]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨s, ⟨hs, hstrict⟩, rfl⟩; refine ⟨s, ⟨(h_mem s).1 hs, h_strict s |>.1 hstrict⟩, rfl⟩
    · rintro ⟨s, ⟨hs, hstrict⟩, rfl⟩; refine ⟨s, ⟨(h_mem s).2 hs, h_strict s |>.2 hstrict⟩, rfl⟩

  have foldl_max_ge_start : ∀ l a, a ≤ l.foldl max a := by
    intro l; induction l <;> intro a <;> simp [*]
    exact le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (by assumption)

  have foldl_max_ge : ∀ l a x, x ∈ l → x ≤ l.foldl max a := by
    intro l; induction l <;> intro a x h <;> simp at h
    · contradiction
    · cases h
      · exact le_trans (le_max_right _ _) (foldl_max_ge_start _ _)
      · exact ih _ _ h

  have foldl_max_mem : ∀ l a, l.foldl max a ∈ a :: l := by
    intro l; induction l generalizing a <;> simp [*]
    · left; rfl
    · rename_i y ys ih
      specialize ih (max a y)
      cases ih with
      | head h => rw [max_eq_left_iff, max_eq_right_iff] at h; cases h <;> simp [*]
      | tail h => right; right; exact h

  constructor
  · rw [←h_lens_eq]
    have h := foldl_max_mem lens 0
    cases h with
    | head h => rw [h]; simp [lens, h_subs, List.mem_sublists, List.nil_sublist, isStrictlyIncreasing]
    | tail h => exact h
  · intro n hn
    rw [←h_lens_eq] at hn
    apply foldl_max_ge _ _ _ hn
  -- !benchmark @end proof
